title: cochlearia pyrenaica subsp. alpina
intro: Cochlearia pyrenaica subsp. alpina, also known as alpine rockcress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of alpine rockcress include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
